headline: A Look At Snap (SNAP) Valuation After Meta Hires Key Content Partnerships Executive
summary: Snap (SNAP) has come under fresh scrutiny after Meta hired Jim Shepherd, the company’s former senior director of global content partnerships, to lead creator and content initiatives for its growing wearables business. See our latest analysis for Snap. The latest 1-day share price return of 2.63% and 90-day share price return of 11.62% sit against a year-to-date share price decline of 27.92% and a 5-year total shareholder return decline of 90.45%. This points to short term momentum but a weak...

headline: TSMC executive drops blunt message on AI chip’s next frontier
summary: Wall Street has spent years pricing AI chip stocks on one core assumption: raw computing power wins. More transistors, more speed, more performance. That was the race, and investors bid up names including Nvidia (NVDA), Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company (TSM), and Broadcom (AVGO) ...

headline: Marvell among the gainers in latest AI trade upswing
summary: Marvell Technology (MRVL) stock has rocketed higher by over 25% after Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang declared the custom chipmaker to be “the next trillion-dollar company" at Computex Taipei 2026. Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson examine the latest headlines moving stocks in the AI trade landscape. This news comes as Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares surge by over 30% in response to the tech company beat past fiscal second quarter estimates on adjusted earnings and revenue.

content.title: Marvell among the gainers in latest AI trade upswing
content.description:
Marvell Technology (MRVL) stock has rocketed higher by over 25% after Nvidia (NVDA) CEO Jensen Huang declared the custom chipmaker to be “the next trillion-dollar company" at Computex Taipei 2026.

Yahoo Finance Senior Reporters Ines Ferré and Brooke DiPalma and EMJ Capital founder and president Eric Jackson examine the latest headlines moving stocks in the AI trade landscape.

This news comes as Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) shares surge by over 30% in response to the tech company beat past fiscal second quarter estimates on adjusted earnings and revenue.

headline: Elation Health Acquires Aster to Expand Agentic Capabilities in Primary Care
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 02, 2026--Elation Health, the clinical-first technology platform for modern primary care success, today announced the acquisition of Aster, an AI-native EHR focused on women's health. The acquisition brings expertise in autonomous AI agents and accelerates Elation's development of the first agentic operating system for primary care: software that handles work on behalf of clinicians, not just assists them. This is Elation's second acquisition, following the purchase of Lightn

headline: How To Earn 12% While Waiting For Arista Stock To Fall
summary: At about $170.68 a share, Arista Networks (ANET) is trading near its 52-week high, fueled by a surge in demand for AI networking infrastructure. The world's largest tech companies, including hyperscalers such as Microsoft (MSFT) and Meta Platforms (META), are spending hundreds of billions of dollars to build AI data centers.
